creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Sat Nov  2 14:48:58 2013
New Revision: 332493
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332493

Log:
  - Update to version 4.26
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support staging
  
  PR:		ports/181070
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Modified:
  head/print/pmw/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/print/pmw/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/print/pmw/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/print/pmw/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/print/pmw/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 14:48:57 2013	(r332492)
+++ head/print/pmw/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 14:48:58 2013	(r332493)
@@ -2,30 +2,27 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	pmw
-PORTVERSION=	4.12
+PORTVERSION=	4.26
 CATEGORIES=	print audio
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.univie.ac.at/applications/www.quercite.com/ \
-		http://www.quercite.com/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.quercite.com/
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	High quality music typesetting program
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+MAKE_ARGS=	FULLECHO=""
 ALL_TARGET=	build
 
-MAN1=		pmw.1
-
-PKGMESSAGE=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-.for file in ChangeLog spec.pdf
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/${file} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+.for i in ChangeLog spec.pdf
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}/doc && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${i} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR})
 .endfor
-.endif
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/print/pmw/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/print/pmw/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 14:48:57 2013	(r332492)
+++ head/print/pmw/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 14:48:58 2013	(r332493)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (pmw-4.12.tar.gz) = 70d9076a63ab0287099154d351d996a63cf252f3b820db115df4f4d944ecc1f6
-SIZE (pmw-4.12.tar.gz) = 1242978
+SHA256 (pmw-4.26.tar.gz) = 7266b60e20a085b0e07dd35c9696dcbc4f3176276fcc12a81b92e159d6459bf1
+SIZE (pmw-4.26.tar.gz) = 1985819

Modified: head/print/pmw/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/print/pmw/pkg-plist	Sat Nov  2 14:48:57 2013	(r332492)
+++ head/print/pmw/pkg-plist	Sat Nov  2 14:48:58 2013	(r332493)
@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
 bin/pmw
+man/man1/pmw.1.gz
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/ChangeLog
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/spec.pdf
 %%DATADIR%%/MIDIperc
@@ -20,6 +21,8 @@ bin/pmw
 %%DATADIR%%/fontmetrics/Helvetica-BoldOblique.afm
 %%DATADIR%%/fontmetrics/Helvetica-Oblique.afm
 %%DATADIR%%/fontmetrics/Helvetica.afm
+%%DATADIR%%/fontmetrics/LICENCE
+%%DATADIR%%/fontmetrics/MustRead.html
 %%DATADIR%%/fontmetrics/NewCenturySchlbk-Bold.afm
 %%DATADIR%%/fontmetrics/NewCenturySchlbk-BoldItalic.afm
 %%DATADIR%%/fontmetrics/NewCenturySchlbk-Italic.afm
